name: python3-cycler
title: python3-cycler
description:
composable kwarg iterator (Python 3)
When using matplotlib and plotting more than one line, it is common to want to
be able to cycle over one  or more artist styles; but the plotting logic can
quickly become very involved.
.
To address this and allow easy cycling over arbitrary 'kwargs' the `Cycler`
class, a composable kwarg iterator, was developed.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of Cycler.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cycler because composable kwarg iterator (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cycler as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cycler with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cycler --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
